_comment: SINGLE-SOURCE Blizzard/Battle.net TACT catalog. Consumed by BOTH the Rust log_processor (include_str! in src/tact_products.rs) AND the C# BattleNetMappingService (embedded resource linked in LancacheManager.csproj). Do NOT duplicate this data anywhere else. Resolution for a /tpr/<seg>/ segment (lowercased): products[seg] -> game; else aliases[seg] -> game; else if seg in shared -> sharedLabel; else unresolved (NULL GameName).

products.zeus: Call of Duty: Black Ops Cold War
products.lazr: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 2 Remastered
